title: Dangerous Intruder
writer: Martin Goldsmith, F. Ruth Howard, Philip MacDonald
actors: Charles Arnt, Veda Ann Borg, Tom Keene
plot: An actress, Jenny (Veda Ann Borg), is hitchhiking across the country when she is accidently struck by a car. The driver, Max Ducone (Charles Arnt), offers to take her into his home until she can resume traveling. Later Ducone's wi...
